title: Avoid using collection constructors as java.util.function.Function
description: It is inadvisable to pass a collection constructor reference as an argument to a method expecting a java.util.function.Function, as this can lead to unexpected memory allocation.
recommendation: Use a Supplier instead of Function when the method argument requires a constructor.
impact: Potential memory allocation issues and security vulnerabilities

checks.message: Avoid using collection constructors as java.util.function.Function
